sizing_rule.note: Allocate between optimal portfolio position and cash blend using Sharpe ratio optimization on Capital Market Line. Formula: Sharpe Ratio = (AHPR - RFR) / SD. Author silent on optimal_f value, kelly_fraction, and max_drawdown_tolerance.

source_rule_text: Combine a percentage of the portfolio with cash using the Capital Market Line (CML) to optimize risk-adjusted returns based on the Sharpe ratio.
